citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: A large dataset is typically required to capture the diversity of a complex domain and narrow down the range of possible reasoner behaviors. Labeling training data is labor-intensive and may require specialized expertise. Bias can be introduced during each step of dataset creation.
